race.comment: KUREDER (1) may have found the mile journey a bit too short when resuming but will have come on with that outing now in the locker. Ready for the step-up in trip now and handles all going. Capable of sharp improvement. Former NSW galloper AMALFI AMORE (8) has won two of three since joining the new stable and maps ideally for this from gate three. Nice weight drop and should run well again. CENTRAL PARK (3) is a three-time winner around this circuit and is much better than that recent effort suggests. Can bounce right back. STADIUM OF LIGHT (5) will be rock-hard fit for this and may earn some minor money. The well-related PEROVIC (4) (half to 2xG1 winner King's Legacy) is best of the rest in a race with only a handful of chances.
